name: Huang Zhong (Hansheng)
page_title: Huang Zhong (Hansheng) 黃忠 (漢升) [Liu Biao, Han Xuan, Shu] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
ranks: General of the Gentlemen of the Household
novel_notes:
Differences Between Fact and Common Fiction
	
		
	Was not ‘fought with and released’ by Guan Yu. With Han Xian, he surrendered to Liu Bei’s army by choice.
	Huang Zhong was not the chief commander of Shu’s Hanzhong campaign. Liu Bei was.
	Died before the battle of Yi Ling, thus did not participate.
	No record of him being “old”

full_text:
Huang Zhong (Hansheng) 黃忠 (漢升)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Huang Zhong (黃忠), styledHansheng (漢升), was born in Nan Yang District (Presently Nan Yang City in He Nan Province). Joined Liu Bei after Han Xuan’s defeat. One of the Five Tiger Generals. Huang Zhong was affiliated with Liu Biao, the Han Xuan Dynasty, and the Shu Kingdom. Huang Zhong lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
Return to theThree Kingdoms Encyclopediaor browse theEncyclopedia Directory.

Fact vs Fiction
Differences Between Fact and Common Fiction
Was not ‘fought with and released’ by Guan Yu. With Han Xian, he surrendered to Liu Bei’s army by choice.
Huang Zhong was not the chief commander of Shu’s Hanzhong campaign. Liu Bei was.
Died before the battle of Yi Ling, thus did not participate.
No record of him being “old”
